description: Style Note adidas helps you avoid discomfort by keeping you dry and comfortable. This tee offers you a stylised look that will make sure you look great on your day off. Pair it with a pair of jeans and sports shoes on the weekend or for Friday casuals at your office. Product Details Dark blue and grey striped polo T-shirt, has a ribbed cutaway collar, chest buttoned placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and appliqued patch on the left arm, branding on the left above the hem and vented hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
